addDish(Dish) - Method in class fr.javaeat.javaeatdishesusers.resource.DishResource

createDish(Dish) - Method in interface fr.javaeat.javaeatdishesusers.repository.DishRepositoryInterface
Persists a new dish in storage.
createDish(Dish) - Method in class fr.javaeat.javaeatdishesusers.repository.DishRepositoryMariadb
Inserts a new dish row in MariaDB.
createDish(Dish) - Method in class fr.javaeat.javaeatdishesusers.service.DishService
Creates a new dish after validating business constraints.
createUser(User) - Method in interface fr.javaeat.javaeatdishesusers.repository.UserRepositoryInterface
Persists a new user in storage.
createUser(User) - Method in class fr.javaeat.javaeatdishesusers.repository.UserRepositoryMariadb
Inserts a new user row in MariaDB.

Creates a new user after validating business constraints.

D

DatabaseConnection - Class in fr.javaeat.javaeatdishesusers.repository
Provides centralized MariaDB connection management for the Repository layer.
deleteDish(int) - Method in interface fr.javaeat.javaeatdishesusers.repository.DishRepositoryInterface
Deletes a dish from storage by identifier.
deleteDish(int) - Method in class fr.javaeat.javaeatdishesusers.repository.DishRepositoryMariadb
Deletes a dish row from MariaDB.
deleteDish(int) - Method in class fr.javaeat.javaeatdishesusers.resource.DishResource
Handles HTTP DELETE requests to remove a dish.
deleteDish(int) - Method in class fr.javaeat.javaeatdishesusers.service.DishService
Deletes an existing dish by identifier.
deleteUser(String) - Method in interface fr.javaeat.javaeatdishesusers.repository.UserRepositoryInterface
Deletes a user from storage by identifier.
deleteUser(String) - Method in class fr.javaeat.javaeatdishesusers.repository.UserRepositoryMariadb
Deletes a user row from MariaDB.
deleteUser(String) - Method in class fr.javaeat.javaeatdishesusers.resource.UserResource
Handles HTTP DELETE requests to remove a user.
deleteUser(String) - Method in class fr.javaeat.javaeatdishesusers.service.UserService
Deletes an existing user by identifier.
Dish - Class in fr.javaeat.javaeatdishesusers.model
Represents a dish domain entity in the Model layer of the layered architecture.
Dish() - Constructor for class fr.javaeat.javaeatdishesusers.model.Dish
Creates an empty dish instance.
Dish(int, String, String, double) - Constructor for class fr.javaeat.javaeatdishesusers.model.Dish
Creates a fully initialized dish instance.
DishRepositoryInterface - Interface in fr.javaeat.javaeatdishesusers.repository
Declares dish persistence operations for the Repository layer.
DishRepositoryMariadb - Class in fr.javaeat.javaeatdishesusers.repository
MariaDB-backed implementation of dish persistence operations in the Repository layer.

Exposes REST endpoints for dish operations in the Resource layer.

DishService - Class in fr.javaeat.javaeatdishesusers.service
Implements business logic for dish operations in the Service layer.

getAllDishes() - Method in interface fr.javaeat.javaeatdishesusers.repository.DishRepositoryInterface
Retrieves all dishes from persistence storage.
getAllDishes() - Method in class fr.javaeat.javaeatdishesusers.repository.DishRepositoryMariadb
Retrieves all dishes from the MariaDB dishes table.
getAllDishes() - Method in class fr.javaeat.javaeatdishesusers.service.DishService
Retrieves all dishes available in the system.
getAllUsers() - Method in interface fr.javaeat.javaeatdishesusers.repository.UserRepositoryInterface
Retrieves all users from persistence storage.

Retrieves all users from the MariaDB users table.
getAllUsers() - Method in class fr.javaeat.javaeatdishesusers.service.UserService
Retrieves all users available in the system.

Returns an active MariaDB connection.

Returns the textual description of the dish.
getDish(int) - Method in class fr.javaeat.javaeatdishesusers.resource.DishResource
Handles HTTP GET requests to retrieve one dish by identifier.

Retrieves one dish by its identifier.
getDishById(int) - Method in class fr.javaeat.javaeatdishesusers.repository.DishRepositoryMariadb
Retrieves one dish from MariaDB by primary key.
getDishById(int) - Method in class fr.javaeat.javaeatdishesusers.service.DishService
Retrieves one dish by identifier.
getDishes() - Method in class fr.javaeat.javaeatdishesusers.resource.DishResource
Handles HTTP GET requests to retrieve all dishes.

Returns the email address of the user.
getId() - Method in class fr.javaeat.javaeatdishesusers.model.Dish
Returns the unique identifier of the dish.
getId() - Method in class fr.javaeat.javaeatdishesusers.model.User
Returns the unique identifier of the user.
getName() - Method in class fr.javaeat.javaeatdishesusers.model.Dish
Returns the business name of the dish.
getName() - Method in class fr.javaeat.javaeatdishesusers.model.User
Returns the display name of the user.
getPassword() - Method in class fr.javaeat.javaeatdishesusers.model.User
Returns the persisted password value of the user.
getPrice() - Method in class fr.javaeat.javaeatdishesusers.model.Dish
Returns the current unit price of the dish.

Handles HTTP GET requests to retrieve one user by identifier.

Retrieves one user by identifier.
